reviews.review_title: My sister bought your stupid mod menu.
reviews.review_description:
10 dollars, TEN DOLLARS THAT WERE MY MONEY, THAT SHE SPENT PLAYING THIS GAME
Please, just lower the mod menus price, I barely know anything about the game but apparently your mod menu is 10 dollars, (it was 11 dollars because of tax but still)

developer_response.body:
Hey, sorry that happened, but we can’t control who buys stuff on your account or uses your money. That’s not really something we caused, so giving the game 1 star for it is honestly pretty unfair.

You can try requesting a refund through Meta if it’s eligible, usually within 14 days and under 2 hours of playtime. Also, we can’t just lower the mod menu price because then basically everyone would have it, and public lobbies would get really annoying fast. The price keeps it more limited so it doesn’t ruin the game for everyone.

reviews.review_description: This is a really good game many good updates and a really good community. I recently met a mod that’s was playing the game. And I had a good time discussing more about the game and how it can improve. Like better map designs, more cosmetics, and a new design I would like personally would be different maps to play in. Playing in the same map can be fun but at the same time it could be a little boring replaying in the same map. So I would personally add more maps but I know that it will take over many months to create new map ideas. So this isn’t really an idea it’s a thought that I think could revive the game and I’m ka sit more fun. And I’m also glad this game came back from the shut down and is revived. Thanks again. - player. ✅
